rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they relate to component type features
Use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings like assignments
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation scope
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in output dependency guarantees
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for assumptions and guarantees
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equations and `const name : type = value;` for constants
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE variables without explicit exposure
